content:
Modern beauty culture is increasingly shaped by social media, technology, and self-optimization trends, raising deeper questions about identity and perception.

## What you'll learn
- Improve advanced English reading and discussion skills
- Develop critical thinking around beauty standards and media influence
- Engage in structured debate on identity and self-image

## Who it's for
- Learners comfortable with advanced English reading materials
- Participants interested in social, cultural, and media topics
- Anyone looking to improve academic-level English discussion ability
title: Better Face Inside Your Face
